summary: Authored the typed work-event schema and per-artifact frontmatter schemas for the AI-Memory vault
details: Built schemas/work-event.schema.json (the single FR-1/FR-3 record) plus one frontmatter schema per live artifact prefix under schemas/artifacts/. Grounded type-specific required fields against the create-note templates.

decisions.decision: Required fields on a work-event are timestamp, project, type, summary, provenance.
decisions.rationale: These are the minimum the daily + per-project views need to render every entry with attribution.

tried_and_failed.attempt: Validate with the repo's bundled JSON-schema tool.
tried_and_failed.why_failed: No ajv/jsonschema present in the repo; installed jsonschema via pip3 for validation instead.
